name: Chocolate-Raspberry Spritz
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels (9 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt Nestle unsweetened chocolate baking bars; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, sugar, and salt until creamy.
4. Blend in egg, preserves, and vanilla extract.
5. Blend in melted chocolate.
6. Gradually beat in flour.
7. Place dough in cookie press fitted with the desired plate.
8. Press dough onto ungreased cookie sheets; decorate with Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes until set. Let stand 1 minute.
10. Remove from cookie sheets and cool completely.
Makes 8 dozen cookies.
